info.title: orchestrascoresmanager-full
info.description: Manage your orchestra's sheet music database directly within Nextcloud

get.summary: Get current list of groups allowed to edit scores
get.description:
Current settings
This endpoint requires admin access

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

200.description: Successful response with the list of groups

401.description: Current user is not logged in

403.description: Logged in account must be an admin

post.summary: Update which groups are allowed to edit scores
post.description:
Updated settings
This endpoint requires admin access
This endpoint requires password confirmation

editGroups.description: List of group IDs allowed to edit

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

200.description: Successful update of settings

401.description: Current user is not logged in

403.description: Logged in account must be an admin

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

401.description: Current user is not logged in

title.description: The title of the folder collection

collectionType.description: The type of the folder collection (alphabetical or indexed)

description.description: The description of the folder collection

validFrom.description: The start date for the initial version (Y-m-d format), defaults to today

201.description: Successful creation of the folder collection

title.description: The title of the folder collection

get.summary: Get all scores in a specific folder collection (including scores from score books)
get.description: the list of scores (with index for indexed collections)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the folder collection

parameters.name: versionId
parameters.description: Optional version ID, uses active version if not specified

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

200.description: Successful response with the list of scores

401.description: Current user is not logged in

post.summary: Add a score to a folder collection
post.description:
Conditions: - The folder collection must exist - The score must exist - If the score is part of a score book, the score book must not be in the collection (cannot add individual scores when their book is in the collection) - For indexed collections: index is required and must not be occupied - For alphabetical collections: index must not be provided
empty response

scoreId.description: The ID of the score to add

index.description: The index position (required for indexed collections)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the folder collection

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

201.description: Successfully added score to folder collection

401.description: Current user is not logged in

delete.summary: Remove a score from a folder collection
delete.description:
Conditions: - The score must be directly in the collection (not via a score book) - If the score is in the collection via a score book, the score book must be removed instead
empty response

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the folder collection

parameters.name: scoreId
parameters.description: The ID of the score to remove

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

200.description: Successfully removed score from folder collection

401.description: Current user is not logged in

get.summary: Get all score books in a folder collection
get.description: the list of score books (with index for indexed collections)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the folder collection

parameters.name: versionId
parameters.description: Optional version ID, uses active version if not specified

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

200.description: Successful response with the list of score books

401.description: Current user is not logged in

post.summary: Add a score book to a folder collection
post.description:
Conditions: - The folder collection must exist - The score book must exist - No score from the score book must already be individually in the collection (cannot add book when individual scores from it are in the collection) - For indexed collections: index is required and must not be occupied - For alphabetical collections: index must not be provided
empty response

scoreBookId.description: The ID of the score book to add

index.description: The index position (required for indexed collections)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the folder collection

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

201.description: Successfully added score book to folder collection

401.description: Current user is not logged in

delete.summary: Remove a score book from a folder collection

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the folder collection

parameters.name: scoreBookId
parameters.description: The ID of the score book to remove

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

200.description: Successfully removed score book from folder collection

401.description: Current user is not logged in

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the folder collection

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

401.description: Current user is not logged in

post.summary: Create a new version for a folder collection

validFrom.description: The start date of the version (Y-m-d format)

validTo.description: The end date of the version (Y-m-d format) or null for active version

copyFromVersionId.description: Optional version ID to copy scores/scorebooks from

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the folder collection

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

401.description: Current user is not logged in

post.summary: Start a new version (deactivates current version, creates new one starting on specified date)

validFrom.description: The start date for the new version (Y-m-d format), defaults to today

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the folder collection

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

201.description: Successful creation of the new version

401.description: Current user is not logged in

get.summary: Get a folder collection version by ID

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the version

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

200.description: Successful response with the version

401.description: Current user is not logged in

patch.description:
Only valid_to can be set for active versions to deactivate them. Non-active versions cannot be modified.
the updated version

validTo.description: The new end date (Y-m-d format) to deactivate the version

parameters.description: The ID of the version to update

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

200.description: Successful update of the version

401.description: Current user is not logged in

get.summary: Return all available scores or a list of specific scores by IDs

parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

200.description: Successful response with the list of scores

401.description: Current user is not logged in

difficulty.description: The difficulty level of the score

digitalStatus.description: The digital status of the score

gemaIds.description: The GEMA IDs of the score

duration.description: The duration of the score in seconds

tagIds.description: optional list of tag ids to link

scoreBook.description: Score book info with id and index (both required)

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

401.description: Current user is not logged in

gemaIds.description: The GEMA IDs of the score

duration.description: The duration of the score in seconds

tagIds.description: optional list of tag ids to link

scoreBook.description: Score book info (id and/or index). Set id to null to remove from book.

parameters.description: The ID of the score to update

get.summary: Get all scores in a score book

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the score book

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

200.description: Successful response with the list of scores

401.description: Current user is not logged in

post.summary: Add a score to a score book
post.description:
Conditions: - The score book must exist - The score must exist - The score must not already be part of any score book (a score can only belong to one book) - The index position must not already be occupied in the book
empty response

scoreId.description: The ID of the score to add

index.description: The index position for the score in the book

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the score book

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

201.description: Successfully added score to score book

401.description: Current user is not logged in

post.summary: Add multiple scores to a score book in one request
post.description:
Conditions (for each score): - The score book must exist - Each score must exist - Each score must not already be part of any score book - Each index position must not already be occupied in the book - Index positions in the request must be unique
empty response

scores.description: Array of score data with scoreId and index

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the score book

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

201.description: Successfully added scores to score book

401.description: Current user is not logged in

delete.summary: Remove a score from a score book
delete.description:
Conditions: - The score book must exist - The score must be part of this specific score book
empty response

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the score book

parameters.name: scoreId
parameters.description: The ID of the score to remove

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

200.description: Successfully removed score from score book

401.description: Current user is not logged in

tags.name: folder_collection_version_api
tags.description: Controller for folder collection version operations. Provides endpoints to access and modify folder collection versions independently of their parent folder collection.
